face.note: Face detection coordinates for this face with live confidence levels.

heart_rate.note: Global estimate of Heart Rate with confidence score using vitallens-2.0.

respiratory_rate.note: Global estimate of Respiratory Rate with confidence score using vitallens-2.0.

hrv_rmssd.note: Global estimate of Heart Rate Variability (RMSSD) with confidence score using vitallens-2.0.

respiratory_waveform.note: Global estimate of Resp Waveform with frame-wise confidence scores using vitallens-2.0.

ppg_waveform.note: Global estimate of PPG Waveform with frame-wise confidence scores using vitallens-2.0.

respiratory_rate.note: Rolling estimate of Respiratory Rate with frame-wise confidence levels.

heart_rate.note: Rolling estimate of Heart Rate with frame-wise confidence levels.

hrv_sdnn.note: Rolling estimate of Heart Rate Variability (SDNN) with frame-wise confidence levels.

hrv_rmssd.note: Rolling estimate of Heart Rate Variability (RMSSD) with frame-wise confidence levels.

message: The provided values are estimates and should be interpreted according to the provided confidence scores. The VitalLens API is not a medical device and its estimates are not intended for any medical purposes.
